title: eleocharis compressa
intro: Eleocharis compressa, also known as the flat-stemmed spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cattail family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Eleocharis compressa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
